title: AI Engineer
company_focus: Micro-learning platform redefining education with AI
description:
Seekho, a Series B, fast-scaling startup , is redefining
micro-learning for millions.

Our next leap? Become an AI company at the core — not just a
learning platform using AI.

We don’t add AI features... We rebuild systems around
intelligence.

If you like owning outcomes, learning daily, and building
cool stuff — read on.

What You’ll Own

- Drive Seekho’s AI direction from an engineering lens
- Run a weekly AI pipeline: Idea → Hypothesis → POC → Evaluate
  → Recommend
- Build and demo sharp AI POCs (retention, personalization,
  engagement)
- Decide what we build, buy, or skip — backed by evidence
- Define clear evaluation frameworks (offline + online
  metrics)
- Convert winning POCs into implementation-ready specs
- Shape Seekho’s AI layer with practical, testable bets

You don’t wait for roadmaps. You create them.

Requirements

- 5–6 years experience in applied AI / ML
- Strong hands-on LLM engineering (prompting, RAG, agents,
  eval pipelines)
- Conversational AI experience preferred
- Solid ML fundamentals (ranking, recsys, experimentation,
  error analysis)
- Rapid prototyping skills — ideas to POCs in days
- Applied research mindset — signal > hype
- Production awareness — latency, cost, guardrails, monitoring
- Strong Python + modern AI stack (OpenAI/Anthropic APIs,
  vector DBs, orchestration frameworks)
- Clear communicator — sharp experiment readouts, crisp
  decisions

BenefitsCurious about life at Seekho? We invite you to
explore our Team & Culture page to learn more about our
values, vibrant teams, and what makes working at Seekho a
truly rewarding experience.
responsibilities: Drive Seekho's AI direction from an engineering lens
Run weekly AI pipeline from idea to recommendation

Evaluate build vs. buy vs. skip decisions backed by evidence
Define evaluation frameworks with offline and online metrics
Convert winning POCs into implementation-ready specs
Shape Seekho's AI layer with practical, testable bets
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role is hands-on with LLMs, RAG, agents, and
conversational AI. The engineer will build AI POCs, create
evaluation frameworks, and convert them to production specs.
Direct model engineering work with prompting, RAG, and
agents makes this ai-first.
